name: Spam Meal in a Bundle
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, sliced (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, mustard, beer, and celery seed.
3. Divide the vegetables and SPAM onto four square pieces of foil measuring 12 inches.
4. Drizzle the mustard mixture over the vegetables.
5. Fold the foil to form packets.
6. Bake for 45-60 minutes or until hot.
